Message: Scanned 1 project(s); detected 1 secret finding(s). Skipped repos (host allow-list): payments/payments-api.

Findings.Title: Repository scan skipped for unsupported Azure DevOps Server host: payments/payments-api
Findings.Detail: Skipped repo 'payments/payments-api': remote host 'ado.contoso.local' is not in RemoteClone allow-list (github.com, dev.azure.com, *.visualstudio.com, *.ghe.com).
Findings.Remediation: Use an allow-listed HTTPS host (for example dev.azure.com or *.visualstudio.com) or run the scan from an environment where the repository host is explicitly approved by policy.
